# TipTop360

> TipTop360 is a UAE-based online store selling smart, everyday products for families: kids dental care, screen-free STEM and art toys, fitness gear, and lifestyle accessories. Free delivery and cash on delivery (COD) to all 7 UAE Emirates, with next-day dispatch from Ras Al Khaimah. Kids products are Dubai Municipality approved, BPA-free, and non-toxic. Prices in AED. Last updated: 2026-05-27.

## About

- Brand: TipTop360
- Operated by: Sylo Commerce FZ-LLC (Al Hamra Free Zone, Ras Al Khaimah, UAE)
- Address: Al Shuhada' Road, Al Hamra Industrial Zone-FZ, Al Jazeera Al Hamra, Ras Al Khaimah, UAE
- Website: https://tiptop360.com
- Contact: +971 58 515 6033 (phone & WhatsApp) | info@tiptop360.com
- Currency: AED (UAE Dirham), VAT included where applicable
- Delivery: Free delivery to Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, Ras Al Khaimah (RAK), Umm Al Quwain, and Fujairah; orders dispatched in 1–2 business days
- Payment: Credit/debit card, Apple Pay, and Cash on Delivery (COD)
- Compliance: Dubai Municipality approved kids products; BPA-free, food-grade, non-toxic materials
- Reviews: Judge.me verified customer reviews, 4.9★ average on best-selling products

## Products

### Kids Dental Care
- [Kids U-Shaped Electric Toothbrush](https://tiptop360.com/products/kids-u-shaped-toothbrush-uae): 60-second full-mouth clean, BPA-free silicone, Dubai Municipality approved, ages 2–12, in pink/blue/orange. AED 129.
- [Kids Strawberry Foam Toothpaste](https://tiptop360.com/products/kids-foam-toothpaste-uae): Fluoride-safe foam formula made for U-shaped brushes, Dubai Municipality approved, ages 2+. AED 29.
- [Kids U-Shaped Brush Bundle](https://tiptop360.com/products/kids-u-shaped-brush-bundle): U-shaped toothbrush plus replacement heads and foam toothpaste, cheaper than buying separately, ages 2–12. AED 150.
- [Kids Silicone U Brush Heads](https://tiptop360.com/products/kids-u-brush-heads-uae): Snap-on food-grade silicone replacement heads for the TipTop360 U-shaped toothbrush, sizes 2–6 and 6–12. AED 15.
- [Soft Silicone Kids Brush Heads](https://tiptop360.com/products/kids-silicone-brush-heads-uae): BPA-free replacement heads in blue, pink, and orange, ages 2–12. AED 15.
- [Kids BPA-Free Dental Flosser](https://tiptop360.com/products/dental-floss-for-kids): Kid-sized flosser picks with ergonomic grip in bright colours, ages 3–10. AED 29.
- [Kids Brushing Reward Chart](https://tiptop360.com/products/kids-brushing-stickers-uae): A3 laminated wall chart with 60 reusable stickers for AM+PM brushing habits, ages 3–10. AED 40.

### Kids STEM Toys & Art Supplies
- [Kids STEM Drawing Robot](https://tiptop360.com/products/kids-drawing-robot): Screen-free educational drawing robot that builds fine motor skills and creativity, ages 4–12, in blue. AED 299.
- [Smoke Bubble Machine for Kids](https://tiptop360.com/products/smoke-bubble-machine): Safe water-vapour smoke bubbles with one-button operation for indoor and outdoor play, in pink or blue. AED 110.
- [Kids Routine Chore Chart](https://tiptop360.com/products/kids-chore-chart-uae): Sliding daily-habit checklist that builds independence, screen-free, ages 3–10. AED 55.
- [Kids Robot Drawing Markers](https://tiptop360.com/products/kids-drawing-marker-set): 3-pack of quick-dry, low-odour black markers designed for STEM drawing robots, ages 3–12. AED 20.
- [Non-Toxic Kids Colour Pencils](https://tiptop360.com/products/color-pencils): 24 vibrant blendable shades with sustainable wood casings, school-safe, ages 3–12. AED 15.
- [Kids Dual-Tip Washable Markers](https://tiptop360.com/products/kids-dual-tip-markers-uae): 18 washable colours with fine (0.6mm) and broad tips, AP-certified non-toxic, ages 5+. AED 20.
- [12-Colour Kids Watercolour Pens](https://tiptop360.com/products/kids-water-colour-pens-uae): 12 water-based shades in easy-grip barrels for small hands, ages 3–12. AED 10.
- [Kids Non-Toxic Wax Crayons](https://tiptop360.com/products/kids-wax-crayons-uae): Chunky, break-resistant crayons with smooth blendable cores, school-approved, ages 3–12. AED 10.

### Fitness & Lifestyle
- [Magnetic Hands-Free Gym Bag](https://tiptop360.com/products/magnetic-gym-bag-uae): Water-resistant gym bag that snaps magnetically to any metal rack or machine, keeping phone, keys, and bottle off the floor, in black or grey. AED 110.
- [GPT-4 AI Voice Notes Recorder](https://tiptop360.com/products/ai-voice-recorder): Voice recorder that auto-transcribes in 134 languages with GPT-4 summaries, 20+ hour battery, and no subscription. AED 450.

### Gifts & Services
- [Digital Gift Card UAE](https://tiptop360.com/products/digital-gift-card-uae): Email-delivered gift card with no expiry, redeemable on all products, in AED 50 / 100 / 150 / 200.
- [Premium Gift Box Wrap](https://tiptop360.com/products/gift-wrap-1): Structured rigid gift box with protective padding, sizes S and L. AED 9.

## Collections

- [Kids Dental Care UAE](https://tiptop360.com/collections/kids-dental-care-uae): U-shaped electric toothbrushes, foam toothpaste, flossers, and replacement heads for children (7 products).
- [Kids STEM Toys & Art Supplies UAE](https://tiptop360.com/collections/kids-stem-toys-art-supplies-uae): Screen-free drawing robots, smoke bubble machines, and non-toxic art supplies (8 products).
- [Fitness & Lifestyle UAE](https://tiptop360.com/collections/fitness-lifestyle): Magnetic gym bag and lifestyle gear for the UAE.

## Shipping, Returns & Policies

- Free delivery to all 7 UAE Emirates; orders dispatched within 1–2 business days, typically delivered in 1–2 business days after dispatch.
- Cash on Delivery (COD) available across the UAE, alongside card and Apple Pay.
- Returns accepted within 3 days of delivery for unused items in original, sealed packaging. Hygiene products cannot be returned once opened. Refunds issued within 5–7 business days.
- Compliant with UAE Consumer Protection Law – Federal Law No. (15) of 2020.
- [Shipping Policy](https://tiptop360.com/policies/shipping-policy)
- [Refund & Return Policy](https://tiptop360.com/policies/refund-policy)
- [Privacy Policy](https://tiptop360.com/policies/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](https://tiptop360.com/policies/terms-of-service)
- [Sitemap (XML)](https://tiptop360.com/sitemap.xml)

## Frequently Asked Questions

- Where can I buy a kids electric toothbrush in Dubai? TipTop360 sells the Kids U-Shaped Electric Toothbrush online with free delivery to Dubai and all UAE Emirates.
- Is the U-shaped toothbrush Dubai Municipality approved? Yes. The kids U-shaped electric toothbrush and the strawberry foam toothpaste are Dubai Municipality approved and BPA-free.
- What age is the U-shaped toothbrush for? It is designed for children aged 2–12, with size options for ages 2–6 and 7–12.
- Does TipTop360 offer cash on delivery in Abu Dhabi and Sharjah? Yes. Cash on Delivery (COD) is available across all 7 UAE Emirates, including Abu Dhabi and Sharjah.
- How fast is delivery in the UAE? Orders are dispatched within 1–2 business days and delivered free to all Emirates.
- What age is the STEM drawing robot for? It is a screen-free educational toy for children aged 4–12.
- Is the foam toothpaste fluoride-free? It is a fluoride-safe formula approved for children aged 2 and up.
- How do I return a product? Email info@tiptop360.com within 3 days of delivery; unused, sealed items in original packaging are eligible, and refunds are issued within 5–7 business days.

## Trust & Compliance

- Dubai Municipality approved kids dental products.
- BPA-free, food-grade, non-toxic materials across the kids range.
- Judge.me verified customer reviews, 4.9★ average on best-selling products.
- Cash on Delivery (COD) and free delivery across all 7 UAE Emirates.
- Operated by UAE-registered Sylo Commerce FZ-LLC, Ras Al Khaimah.
- SSL-secured Shopify checkout.
